subject: Live in 1 Hour: The Next Step for CD
body_html:
Join us to eliminate tribal knowledge and manual handoffs. ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­  

Hi A,

 

Continuous Delivery may have solved deployment, but it hasn't solved the "access" problem.  We go live in 1 hour to discuss how platform teams bridge the gap between catalog data, environments, and pipelines to eliminate friction. Join us to learn how to finally automate consistency.

Join Us Live

What you'll learn:

  • The Self-Service Gap: Why CD alone fails to scale in distributed teams.
  • Invisible Guardrails: How to enforce policy and security without slowing down devs.
  • Eliminating Toil: Strategies to reduce the operational burden of managing global delivery.
  • Abstraction at Scale: Building a platform where you don’t need to be a "pipeline expert" to ship code.

Can't make it live? Register anyway and we'll send you a recording straight to your inbox.

More webinars coming up

Break the cycle of spending $250bn on manual IT operations with the IT knowledge graph

Rules-based automation solves only 20% of IT problems, leaving a $250 billion manual burden. BigPanda’s IT Knowledge Graph fixes this by connecting fragmented data and institutional knowledge, allowing AI to handle the complex reasoning rules cannot. Join us on April 28 to see how this shift drives 430% ROI and reduces outages by replacing reactive, manual operations.

 

From vectors to tensors: Expanding the possibilities of AI search

In this session, we will offer a practical primer on what tensors are, why they matter, and what they make possible in real-world applications, along with concrete use cases across retail, life sciences, and financial services. Join us live on May 5!

Your delivery pipeline’s impact on AI productivity
Organizations are rapidly pouring money into AI tools, expecting faster, more reliable software delivery — but gains aren’t showing up where it counts. Join us on May 7 to explore why AI gains stall, how pipelines absorb throughput, which Continuous Delivery capabilities matter most, and how to close the automation gap.

 

Developer-led observability: Debugging distributed and AI systems with runtime telemetry

This webinar on integrating observability into everyday workflows is now available on-demand. Catch the replay to see real-world examples and live debugging demonstrations that show how to move faster, escalate less, and build more reliable AI-driven systems from the start.

Connect with The New Stack
